name: Hover.dev Mouse Image Trail
description: An interactive container that spawns a trail of custom visual cards at the mouse cursor coordinates with staggered animation and automatic cleanup.

name: Landingfolio Premium Pricing Deck
description: A responsive business pricing layout containing monthly/yearly toggles, highlighted feature badges, detailed checklist icons, and custom call-to-actions.

name: FreeFrontend Vector Wave Canvas
description: An automated background rendering overlapping, smooth vector sine waves using HTML5 Canvas coordinates, simulating flowing fluids.

name: DevSnap Sparticles Canvas Effect
description: A high-performance particle background system simulating floating, glowing sand particles on a canvas container.
